title: RobotYOUNG Academy
description: ដំណើរ កសាងស្តង់ដាអប់រំ ដើម្បីគុណភាពសិក្សាបុត្រធីតារបស់លោកអ្នក​ផ្តល់ការយកចិត្តទុកដាក់ខ្លាំង លើកម្មវិធីសិក្សា របស់បុត្រធីតារបស់លោកអ្នក។
content:
ពួកយើងកសាងឧត្តមភាពតាមរយៈ ទំនើបភាវូបនីយកម្មកម្មវិធីសិក្សា ដែលរមែងវិវត្តកំនែទម្រង់ស្តង់ដាបង្រៀន ជាមួយនឹងគុណភាពអប់រំ កាន់តែប្រសើរឡើងពីមួយថ្ងៃទៅមួយថ្ងៃ។ 

 

 

ជាមួយនឹងជំនាញបណ្ដុះបណ្ដាលបច្ចេកវិទ្យាស្ទេមដ៏ឈានមុខគេ ពីគ្រូបណ្ដុះបណ្ដាលសុទ្ធសឹងជាវិស្វកររ៉ូបូត និងមេរៀនត្រូវបានកែសម្រួល និង សម្ភារៈបង្ហាត់រៀងរាល់សប្តាហ៍ រាល់ឧបករណ៍សិក្សារៀនសូត្រ ត្រូវបាន រចនាតម្លើងត្រៀមសម្រាប់សិស្សានុសិស្ស យ៉ាងយកចិត្តទុកដាក់បំផុតពីបណ្ឌិត និង អនុបណ្ឌិតផ្នែកបច្ចេកវិទ្យាជាន់ខ្ពស់ នៃឧស្សាហកម្មរ៉ូបូត ដែលគុណភាពអប់រំទទួលស្គាល់ដោយប្រទេសបារាំង និងជប៉ុន ដើម្បីធានាឲ្យបានការសិក្សា របស់បុត្រធីតាលោកអ្នកមាន គុណភាពអប់រំល្អប្រសើរបំផុត។ 

 

 

RobotYOUNG Academy ជាទីទុកចិត្ត នៃអនាគតបុត្រធីតា ក្នុងយុគសម័យបច្ចេកវិទ្យាប្រកបដោយ គុណតម្លៃស្តង់ដា នៃមូលធនមនុស្ស និង ជាទីទុកចិត្តរបស់លោកអ្នក។ 
✨ ថ្នាក់វគ្គសិក្សាថ្មី កំពុងបើកទទួលការចុះឈ្មោះ ចូលរៀននៅថ្ងៃនេះហើយ! 
☎️ លេខទូរស័ព្ទ/ Telegram: 010 999 079 / 015 999 187
🌐 Website: robotyoung.com

title: Exciting Developments at Connexion Koh Pich
description: There's so much unfolding at Connexion Koh Pich – the dawn of Tech Valley by the Mekong. Thrilling developments are on the horizon!
content:
There’s a lot going on at Connexion Koh Pich, marking the beginning of the Tech Valley by the Mekong. This vibrant hub is set to transform the region into a center of technological innovation and entrepreneurship. With a focus on fostering collaboration among startups, established businesses, and educational institutions, Connexion Koh Pich is poised to become a key player in the tech landscape of Cambodia.

 

 

As the Tech Valley takes shape, the area promises to attract a diverse range of tech-driven initiatives and projects. Entrepreneurs and innovators will find ample opportunities to connect, share ideas, and develop cutting-edge solutions that address local and global challenges. The synergy created within this ecosystem will not only boost technological advancement but also contribute to economic growth in the region.

 

 

In addition to tech startups, Connexion Koh Pich aims to host events, workshops, and training programs that will empower individuals and organizations to enhance their skills and knowledge in technology and innovation. By providing resources and support, the Tech Valley will nurture a community of forward-thinking professionals ready to drive change in various sectors.

 

 

Exciting times are ahead as Connexion Koh Pich embarks on this journey to establish the Tech Valley by the Mekong. With its strategic location and commitment to fostering a collaborative environment, the area is set to become a beacon of innovation in Cambodia. Join us in witnessing the evolution of this dynamic space!

title: AI Farm Robotics Welcomes Burapha University Delegation
description: AI FARM ROBOTICS is excited to host a delegation of professors from Burapha University for a collaborative visit! Burapha University
content:
AI Farm Robotics is thrilled to host a delegation of professors from Burapha University, a renowned public institution in Thailand. Known for its diverse range of academic programs, Burapha University has gained global recognition for its innovative approaches in industrial applications and its entrepreneurial spirit. This collaborative visit marks an exciting opportunity for both institutions to exchange knowledge and explore potential partnerships in the field of robotics and automation.

 

 

As a trailblazer in Phnom Penh, Cambodia, AI Farm Robotics is committed to revolutionizing the landscape of robotics and automation in the region. Founded in 2017, the company has made significant strides toward establishing Cambodia as a key player in the global robotics sector. By focusing on cutting-edge technology and innovative solutions, AI Farm Robotics aims to drive technological independence and excellence within the country.

 

 

The company's vision extends beyond traditional robotics; AI Farm Robotics seeks to develop autonomous systems capable of self-replication. This ambitious goal positions the company not only as a leader in the industry but also as a catalyst for technological advancement in Cambodia. By fostering a culture of innovation, AI Farm Robotics is dedicated to creating a robust ecosystem that supports research, development, and implementation of advanced robotic technologies.
Through this collaboration with Burapha University, AI Farm Robotics hopes to enhance its capabilities and broaden its impact on the industry. The partnership will facilitate the sharing of expertise and resources, ultimately contributing to the growth of a vibrant robotics community in Cambodia. Together, they aim to propel the nation toward becoming a hub for technological innovation, paving the way for future advancements in robotics and automation.

title: CamStartup: Connecting Cambodia’s Startups to Global Innovation
description: CamStartup enhances Cambodia's startup ecosystem by providing essential support and resources for entrepreneurs. Through networking, mentorship, and advocacy, it fosters innovation and drives business growth in the region.
content:
The Federation of Cambodian Startups (CamStartup) is dedicated to fostering and supporting the startup ecosystem in Cambodia. Its mission is to provide a robust platform for Cambodian entrepreneurs, innovators, and startups to connect, collaborate, and grow. By focusing on advocacy for policies and initiatives that benefit startups, CamStartup aims to empower the entrepreneurial community in the region.

 

 

The organization plays a crucial role in facilitating innovation and driving business growth. By fostering a culture of entrepreneurship, CamStartup encourages new ideas and ventures, helping to create an environment where startups can thrive. Collaboration with both government and private sectors is key to establishing a favorable landscape for emerging businesses.

 

 

In addition to advocacy, CamStartup offers a variety of resources, mentorship, and networking opportunities designed to support entrepreneurs on their journey to success. These services may include incubation programs, access to investors, and educational initiatives that equip startups with the skills and knowledge they need to flourish in a competitive market.

 

 

By raising awareness about entrepreneurship and tech innovation within the Cambodian business community, CamStartup is making significant strides towards a vibrant startup ecosystem. Together, these efforts are paving the way for a new generation of innovators and business leaders in Cambodia.

title: Supporting the KhmerCoders Community: Building Cambodia's Tech Ecosystem
description: KhmerCoders community, a local homegrown developer gathering in Cambodia, plays a vital role in supporting the tech ecosystem.
content:
The KhmerCoders community is a vital local gathering of developers in Cambodia, dedicated to supporting the tech ecosystem. This community primarily focuses on software engineers, web developers, DevOps, and IT-related professionals, creating a network that addresses the critical shortage of skilled manpower in these fields.

 

 

This shortage poses significant challenges for local startups, making it difficult to recruit tech talent and attracting major tech companies to Cambodia. As a result, the country's technological growth is hindered, limiting opportunities for innovation and development in the region.

 

 

To propel Cambodia towards a stronger tech landscape, initiatives like KhmerCoders are essential. By fostering collaboration and knowledge sharing among tech professionals, the community helps to create a more dynamic and vibrant tech ecosystem.

 

 

We are proud to support such an important community that plays a crucial role in shaping the future of technology in Cambodia. Together, we can work towards building a robust framework that nurtures talent and drives technological advancement in the Kingdom.

title: Exciting developments in the realm of Industry 4.0
description: Exciting developments in the realm of Industry 4.0! Dr. Kimang Khun recently shared insights on the Future of Artificial Intelligence at the AI FARM ROBOTICS Factory, located at the FactoryAI Innovation Center in Tech Valley by the Mekong.
content:
Exciting developments are unfolding in the realm of Industry 4.0! Recently, Dr. Kimang Khun shared valuable insights on the Future of Artificial Intelligence at the AI FARM ROBOTICS Factory, located within the FactoryAI Innovation Center in Tech Valley by the Mekong, Connexion, Koh Pich, Phnom Penh, Cambodia. This gathering highlighted the transformative potential of AI in shaping the future of manufacturing and various industries.

 

 

The impact of AI on Industry 4.0 is profound, particularly in the realm of smart manufacturing. By integrating intelligent systems, companies can save time, enhance product quality, and significantly reduce waste. The utilization of artificial intelligence and machine learning allows for optimized processes that can swiftly adapt to changes in demand, customer preferences, and external factors along the value chain, thus improving overall efficiency.

 

 

In the manufacturing sector, AI offers numerous benefits, including predictive maintenance, inventory management, production planning, process control, machinery inspection, and logistics. As the focus shifts toward sustainability and customer-centric production, technologies such as 3D printing are being leveraged for on-demand production and lean manufacturing strategies. These advancements not only streamline operations but also promote environmentally friendly practices.

 

 

Moreover, technological innovations in the Internet of Things (IoT) and Industrial Internet of Things (IIoT) have empowered AI to tackle supply, production, and logistical challenges, making it an essential technology for Industry 4.0. While AI is experiencing rapid growth, there are also emerging concerns about the potential for Artificial General Intelligence to surpass human capabilities and the implications this could have for society. As we navigate this exciting landscape, it is crucial to consider both the opportunities and challenges that AI presents.

title: AI FARM ROBOTICS Partners with Ramaiah Institute of Technology from India
description: Empowering Cambodia's Future: A Partnership for Robotics Education and Innovation
content:
AI FARM ROBOTICS (AIF ROBOTICS) has partnered with Ramaiah Institute of Technology in India with the mission to transform Cambodia into a robotic nation. Our vision is to become a LIVING CODE CREATOR, where robots create robots, utilizing GPT technology for robotics. Their portfolio includes core R&D in robotics, system integration and smart manufacturing for MSMEs automation, GPT for robotics, and Robotics as a Service (RaaS) for innovative solutions.

 

 

Ramaiah Institute of Technology, established in 1962 and recently celebrating its Golden Jubilee, is an autonomous private engineering college located in Bengaluru, Karnataka. Affiliated with Visvesvaraya Technological University, the college offers a range of programs from Bachelor of Engineering to PhD across various disciplines, equipping students with the skills needed for today's technological landscape.

 

 

Exciting discussions are underway to collaborate on establishing a school business office and a specialized training center in Phnom Penh. This center aims to provide hybrid curriculum training in areas such as AI, automation, IoT, computer vision, cloud computing, data analytics, blockchain, and cyber engineering. These skills are essential for driving Cambodia's economic growth and creating job opportunities.

 

 

By fostering such educational initiatives, we aim to empower the next generation of Cambodian innovators and entrepreneurs, ensuring they are equipped with the necessary expertise to thrive in a rapidly evolving technological world.

title: AI Farm Robotics Partners with Educational Institutions
description: American Pacific International School prioritizes global citizenship through a diverse curriculum, fostering independence, care, and responsibility in students while honoring Cambodian culture.
content:
AI FARM ROBOTICS is excited to announce its partnership with Robot Young Academy and CodeYoung CodeAI Academy to introduce STEM tech products to students at the American Pacific International School in Phnom Penh, Cambodia. This collaboration aims to enhance the educational experience by integrating technology and robotics into the curriculum, providing students with valuable skills for the future.

 

 

The American Pacific International School prioritizes global citizenship through a diverse curriculum that fosters independence, care, and responsibility in its students. By honoring Cambodian culture while embracing modern educational practices, the school prepares students to thrive in a rapidly changing world. This partnership will further enrich the learning environment, equipping students with the tools they need to succeed in STEM fields.

 

 

AI Farm Robotics is at the forefront of driving Cambodia's evolution into a robotics hub with its visionary mission of "Create a Living Code – Robot Makes Robot." This initiative emphasizes the importance of innovation and creativity in robotics, encouraging students to engage with technology in a hands-on manner. By fostering an interest in robotics, AI Farm Robotics aims to inspire the next generation of innovators.

Through this strategic partnership, AI Farm Robotics not only propels its own growth in robotics technology but also positions Cambodia as a global leader in innovation. By empowering students with the knowledge and skills to navigate the technological landscape, this initiative lays the groundwork for a brighter, more technologically advanced future for the country.

title: Thank You to CICC - Cambodia - Israel Chamber of Commerce for Co-Organizing "Born for Greatness"
description: We are feeling proud that we are a part to ignite dream, unleash potential, trigger imagination and create life goal for children from five partnering NGOs in technology especially in ai, robotics, automation and drone.
content:
We would like to extend our heartfelt thanks to the Cambodia-Israel Chamber of Commerce (CICC) for allowing us to be part of their initiative by co-organizing "Born for Greatness" on August 3rd, 2024. This event will support 190 underprivileged children from NGOs such as Tiny Toones Cambodia, Colt, Ptea Clara, Project Aokas, and ISF Cambodia. We are proud to participate in igniting dreams, unleashing potential, triggering imagination, and helping these children establish life goals, particularly in the fields of technology, including AI, robotics, automation, and drones.

 

 

In a world that is often divided and rapidly changing, it's easy to overlook those who are left behind, struggling for basic necessities like food and education. Let us take a moment to reflect on the greater cause and consider our roles in this world. We must prioritize the well-being of our children, transcending politics and personal interests, to ensure they have opportunities for a brighter future.

 

 

We fully support CICC's mission to create a positive impact and inspire Cambodia's youth to explore innovation. By fostering a culture of growth and creativity, we aim to encourage those willing to venture into the exciting realms of technology, problem-solving, and innovation. Together, we can help shape a future where children are empowered to pursue their dreams.

 

 

At AI FARM ROBOTICS, the social aspect of our mission is centered on driving positive change and improving the lives of the bottom billions, including underprivileged children and youth. Through technology, innovation, and creativity, we strive to make a meaningful difference in their lives, helping them to build a better tomorrow.

title: Introducing the Micro:Bot Board
description: Introduce the Micro:Bot board, researched and developed by STEAMx LAB at AI FARM ROBOTICS!
content:
We are excited to introduce the Micro:Bot board, a cutting-edge innovation researched and developed by STEAMx LAB at AI FARM ROBOTICS. This all-in-one PCB board is specifically designed for robotics enthusiasts, providing a comprehensive platform that caters to both students and hobbyists. With its user-friendly design, the Micro:Bot simplifies the process of learning and building robotic systems.

 

 

The Micro:Bot board is equipped with built-in DC motor drivers, servo control, and wireless communication support, making it an ideal choice for a wide range of robotics projects. This integrated approach eliminates the need for multiple components, allowing users to focus on creativity and problem-solving. Whether you’re constructing a simple robot or a complex automated system, the Micro:Bot has you covered.

 

 

Designed to facilitate hands-on learning, the Micro:Bot board encourages experimentation and exploration in robotics. It provides all the essential tools needed to bring your ideas to life, promoting an engaging and interactive learning experience. With clear documentation and resources available, users can easily navigate their projects and gain valuable insights into robotics and automation.

 

 

Unlock your creativity and start building today with the Micro:Bot board! This innovative platform is not just a tool; it’s a gateway to discovering the exciting world of robotics. Join the growing community of makers and innovators, and take your first step towards creating your own robotic solutions.

title: MecaSUS Robot: A Comprehensive Gateway to STEM Learning and Robotics Exploration
description: The MecaSUS Robot from STEAMx Lab is an educational tool that introduces students to STEM and robotics through hands-on learning in Mechanical, Electrical, and Programming, fostering critical thinking and teamwork.
content:
The MecaSUS Robot, produced by STEAMx Lab, is now ready and packaged for delivery to customers and students eager to explore STEM and robotics. This innovative robot serves as an excellent starting point for learners, providing foundational knowledge in key areas such as Mechanical, Electrical, and Programming—essential disciplines in the field of robotics.

 

 

Designed to engage and educate, the MecaSUS Robot facilitates hands-on learning that fosters curiosity and creativity. It is particularly well-suited for students embarking on their educational journeys, as it empowers them to build crucial skills that will pave the way for future careers in engineering and technology.

 

 

By introducing learners to the principles of robotics, the MecaSUS Robot opens doors to an exciting world of possibilities. With its comprehensive approach to teaching, it encourages exploration and experimentation, helping students develop a solid foundation for further studies in STEM fields.

 

 

In summary, the MecaSUS Robot is more than just a learning tool; it's an invitation for young minds to delve into the fascinating realm of robotics and engineering, inspiring the next generation of innovators and problem solvers.

title: AI FARM ROBOTICS Partners with Harrods International Academy
description: This collaboration aims to introduce the STEM training program by RobotYoung Academy as a professional extracurricular class for all Harrods students in Cambodia.
content:
AI FARM ROBOTICS is excited to announce a new partnership with Harrods International Academy of Global Schools Group in Singapore. This collaboration includes the signing of a Memorandum of Understanding to introduce a STEM training program by RobotYoung Academy as a professional extracurricular class for all Harrods students in Cambodia. This initiative aims to enhance the educational offerings and better prepare students for future challenges.

 

 

Five years ago, Harrods International Academy launched the Cambridge STEM education program, focusing on coding for its students. Now, in partnership with RobotYoung Academy, which is renowned for its innovative programs in robotics, drones, IoT, computer vision, AI algorithms, and gaming, Harrods aims to further equip its students for the demands of the Industrial 4.0 economy.

 

 

RobotYoung Academy is committed to enhancing STEM 4.0 education in both public and private schools, and this partnership aligns perfectly with its mission. By providing cutting-edge training and resources, RobotYoung Academy seeks to support educational institutions in Cambodia and help them adapt to the evolving technological landscape.

 

 

The ultimate goal of this collaboration is to build human capital 4.0, contributing to Cambodia’s economic development. Together, AI FARM ROBOTICS, Harrods International Academy, and RobotYoung Academy are dedicated to fostering a new generation of skilled professionals ready to thrive in a rapidly changing world.

title: កម្មវិធី BATTLEBOTx រដូវកាលទី២
description: ការធ្វើដំណើរឆ្ពោះទៅការអភិវឌ្ឍមូលធនមនុស្ស ៤.០ ដើម្បីកម្ពុជា បានកើតឡើងជាបន្ត នៅថ្ងៃទី២១ ខែកក្តដា ឆ្នាំ២០២៤ នៅរាជធានីភ្នំពេញ ប្រទេសកម្ពុជា
content:
ការធ្វើដំណើរឆ្ពោះទៅការអភិវឌ្ឍមូលធនមនុស្ស ៤.០ ដើម្បីកម្ពុជា បានកើតឡើងជាបន្ត នៅថ្ងៃទី២១ ខែកក្តដា ឆ្នាំ២០២៤ នៅរាជធានីភ្នំពេញ ប្រទេសកម្ពុជា តាមរយៈកម្មវិធី BATTLEBOTx រដូវកាលទី២ ដែលមានក្រុមរ៉ូបូតចំនួន ៦០ក្រុមបានចូលរួម រហូតយើងស្វែងរកបានជ័យលាភីលេខ១ នៅថ្ងៃប្រកួតដ៏អស្ចារ្យនេះ។ កិច្ចការទាំងនេះ អាចដំណើរការទៅបាន តែងតែមានការចូលរួមគាំទ្រជានិច្ច។ ក្នុងឧ៌កាសនេះ ក្រុមការងារ BATTLEBOTx សូមអរគុណដល់ដៃគូរគាំទ្រទាំងអស់ រួមមាន ក្រុមហ៊ុន អេអាយ ហ្វាម រ៉ូបូទិក (AI FARM ROBOTICS), សមាគមអភិវឌ្ឍឧស្សាហកម្មរ៉ូបូតកម្ពុជា (CRIDA), សហគ្រិនខ្មែរ (Khmer Enterprise), ណេតលិង (Netlink Broadcasting) និង Technology Cambodia។ 

 

 

ជាមួយគ្នានេះ យើងក៏សូមថ្លែងអំណរគុណ ឯកឧត្តម សុខ សប្បាយណា តំណាងដ៏ខ្ពង់ខ្ពស់របស់ ឯកឧត្តម ឧបនាយករដ្ឋមន្ត្រី ហ៊ុន ម៉ានី និង ឯកឧត្តម បណ្ឌិត ឈាង វណ្ណមុន្នីន នាយកប្រតិបត្តិ សហគ្រិនខ្មែរ ដែលបានមកចូលរួមទស្សនាការប្រកួតរ៉ូបូតដ៏អស្ចារ្យនេះ ហើយបានផ្តល់កិត្តិយសផ្តល់ពានរង្វាន់ និងរង្វាន់លើកទឹកចិត្តដល់ក្រុមកីឡាកររ៉ូបូតទាំងអស់។ កុំភ្លេច យើងនឹងជួបគ្នាម្តងទៀត សម្រាប់រដូវកាលទី៣ នៅពេលដ៏ឆាប់ៗនេះ នៅក្នុងកម្មវិធីដ៏ធំប្រចាំឆ្នាំ Khmer Enterprise Summit នៅក្នុងខែវិច្ឆិកា ឆ្នាំ២០២៤ នេះ។ 

 

 

យើងនឹងបន្តការងារនេះ ឱ្យទៅជាចលនាប្រកួតរ៉ូបូតទូទាំងប្រទេស ហើយដោយប្រើប្រាស់បច្ចេកវិទ្យាបញ្ញាសិប្បនិម្មិតកាន់តែទំនើប ដើម្បីក្រុមយុវជនសិស្សនិស្សិត និងសិស្សានុសិស្ស អភិវឌ្ឍជំនាញវិទ្យាសាស្ត្រ និងបច្ចេកវិទ្យាកាន់តែខ្លាំង ដើម្បីសម្រេចបានគោលដៅ ការកសាងមូលធនមនុស្ស ៤.០ ដើម្បីកម្ពុជាឆ្នាំ២០៥០។

title: Mini-Invisible One
description: Mini- Invisible One​ គឺប្រភេទដៃរ៉ូបូត​ដែលមាន3 DOF សម្រាប់​ការអប់រំ​ផ្នែក STEM ដែល​ល្អសម្រាប់​Pick and place រឺ​ចាប់វត្ថុផ្សេងៗ​និង​​គូរ​រូប​ ផលិតដោយ​ AUTOBOTx Lab របស់យេីង។
content:
មនុស្សយន្តនេះល្អបំផុតសម្រាប់វិស័យអប់រំ និង​បំផុសគំនិតដល់ Robotic engineers ជំនាន់ក្រោយ។ អ្នក​ប្រើ​អាច​គ្រប់គ្រង​រ៉ូបូតបាន​តាម​រយៈ​កម្មវិធី​ទូរស័ព្ទ​របស់​យើង ហើយ​ក៏​អាច​សរសេរ​Programដេីម្បីអោយរ៉ូបូតធ្វេីការងារផ្សេងៗផងដែរ។

_______________________________________________________________________________

Mini-Invisible One is a 3 DOF Robot for STEM education, suitable for Pick and place application, Drawing, Material handling made by AUTOBOTx Lab.
This robot is the best choice for education, which inspire the next generation of robotics engineers. User can control the robot via our Mobile App, and also can program the robot to perform any tasks.

 

 

Mini Robot Arm for Education 4.0! ស្វែងយល់ពីដំណើរការដ៏គួរឱ្យចាប់អារម្មណ៍នៅពីក្រោយការបង្កើត Mini Invisible One ដែលជាដៃមនុស្សយន្តខ្នាតតូចផលិតដោយមោទនភាពនៅក្នុងប្រទេសកម្ពុជា។ ទស្សនាការរួមបញ្ចូលគ្នានៃបច្ចេកវិទ្យា និងសិល្បៈហត្ថកម្ម នៅពេលដែលវិស្វករនៃមនុស្សយន្តកម្ពុជាវ័យក្មេងនាំមកនូវការច្នៃប្រឌិតថ្មីនេះ តាមរយៈការផ្គុំគ្នាយ៉ាងជាក់លាក់ និងការសរសេរកម្មវិធីដ៏ស្មុគស្មាញ។ 
បង្កើតឡើងដោយមោទនភាពដោយ AUTOBOTx Lab & AI FARM Robotics Factory គម្រោងនេះគឺជាសក្ខីភាពមួយចំពោះភាពរីកចម្រើនរបស់ប្រទេសកម្ពុជាក្នុងវិស័យអប់រំ និង បច្ចេកវិទ្យា។

_______________________________________________________________________________

Mini Robot Arm for Education 4.0! Discover the intriguing process behind the creation of the Mini Invisible One, a small robot arm proudly made in Cambodia. Witness the fusion of technology and craftsmanship as young Cambodian robotic engineers bring this innovation to life through precision assembly and intricate programming. Proudly developed by AUTOBOTx Lab & AI FARM Robotics Factory, this project is a testament to Cambodia's prowess in STEM education.

 

 

Mini-Invisible One - ដៃរ៉ូបូតខ្នាតតូចជំនាន់ទី១ ជាសមិទ្ធផលថ្មីដែលផលិតនិងស្រាវជ្រាវដោយ AUTOBOTx បានធ្វើការវេចខ្ចប់រួចរាល់។
ល្អបំផុតសម្រាប់ការសិក្សាផ្នែក STEAM ក៏ដូចជាការស្វែងយល់ជាច្រើនអំពី ដៃរ៉ូបូត។

រ៉ូបូតនេះ - មានមុខងារដូចជា: 
• អាចបញ្ជាតាមរយះ APPទូរស័ព្ទ និង ការប្រូក្រាម
• អាចបញ្ជាទៅមុខទៅក្រោយឆ្វេងស្ដាំ គូររូប ចាប់របស់របរអោយផ្លាស់ទី ពីទីតាំងមួយទៅទីតាំងមួយបានយ៉ាងងាយ
• នៅលើរ៉ូបូតមានកន្លែង ដែលអាច ភ្ជាប់ Micro-controller បន្ថែមដើម្បីអាចប្រូក្រាមបាន
• ធន រឹងមាំ ស្រាល
_______________________________________________________________________________
Mini-Invisible One – 3 DOF arm robot first generation, a new achievement produced and researched by AUTOBOTx, has been packaged.
The best choice for STEAM education as well as learning more about robotic arms.
The robot - has functions such as:
• Can be controlled via mobile APP and programming
• Can move forward, backward, left, right, drawing, pick and place objects from one place to another place easily
• On the robot there is a place to connect an additional Micro-controller to be able to program
• Light and strong

title: Strategic Partnership Meeting Between AI FARM ROBOTICS, VP Start, and HUY YUN AGRICULTURE
description: Thursday, July 11, 2024, marked a significant moment as HUY YUN AGRICULTURE joined VP Start for a pivotal meeting at the head office of AI FARM ROBOTICS.
content:
A pivotal meeting took place at the head office of AI FARM ROBOTICS, bringing together the top management teams from AI FARM ROBOTICS, VP Start, and HUY YUN AGRICULTURE. This collaboration marked a significant moment for all parties involved as they engaged in fruitful discussions focused on technology, production, energy management, and the digital sector.

The primary objective of this collaborative session was to foster innovation among local engineers and create more job opportunities, which would ultimately strengthen the local tech landscape and ecosystem. By prioritizing these goals, the companies aimed to support the growth of the regional workforce and encourage the development of new skills in emerging technologies.

During the discussions, several technology collaboration projects were highlighted, including initiatives in smart agriculture, smart cities, and smart homes. These projects are envisioned to integrate the advanced capabilities of AI technology and solutions provided by AI FARM ROBOTICS, showcasing the potential for transformative impacts across various sectors.

AI FARM ROBOTICS expressed its gratitude to VP Start and HUY YUN AGRICULTURE for their forward-thinking approach and commitment to sharing innovative ideas. This partnership not only aims to drive mutual growth but also to enhance the overall technological landscape, paving the way for future advancements in agriculture and related fields.
topic: A Meeting of Minds in Agri-Tech

title: Welcome to AI FARM ROBOTICS Factory
description: AI FARM ROBOTICS Welcomes Chinese Investors to Explore Opportunities in Cambodia
content:
AI FARM ROBOTICS is excited to announce the recent visit of Chinese investors exploring the potential for technology assembly plants in Cambodia. They are particularly interested in manufacturing drones, IoT devices, automation solutions, and robotics for small and medium enterprises (SMEs) and Special Economic Zones, aiming to expand their international product offerings.

 

 

Renowned for its innovative solutions, AI FARM ROBOTICS has garnered global attention as a leader in robotics. This meeting highlights the company's growing appeal and the potential for collaborative ventures that enhance product development and manufacturing.

 

 

The prospect of a new assembly plant in Cambodia presents significant opportunities for local economic growth. Attracting foreign investment can lead to job creation and technological advancements, benefiting the Cambodian economy.

 

 

Looking ahead, AI FARM ROBOTICS is optimistic about future collaborations that could drive innovation in robotics and automation, enhancing the country's competitiveness in the global market.

title: Strategic Collaboration for Industrial Advancement in Cambodia
description: Collaboration with top industry experts in robotics, drones, battery technology, and more, in Shenzhen, China.
content:
AI FARM ROBOTICS is excited to announce our collaboration with leading industry experts in robotics, drones, battery technology, and more, based in Shenzhen, China. This partnership aims to drive innovation through cutting-edge projects that encompass industrial support, PCB, PCBA, embedded PC systems, smart city development, smart factory solutions, solar technology, and AI-based advancements.

 

 

As part of this collaboration, we are also facilitating the establishment of assembly plants in Cambodia, working alongside a group of manufacturers. This initiative is designed to enhance market order fulfillment and ensure that local industries can meet growing demands effectively.

 

 

Over the next 12 months, we anticipate significant developments in Cambodia, particularly in advancing Industrial 4.0 initiatives. These efforts will not only enhance technological capabilities but also contribute to the modernization of the local industry.

 

 

Moreover, this collaboration is focused on fostering job opportunities within Cambodia, creating a skilled workforce ready to tackle the challenges of the future. By bringing together expertise and resources, AI FARM ROBOTICS is committed to driving economic growth and innovation in the region.

title: Cambodia-Japan Digitalized Manufacturing Center
description: AI FARM ROBOTICS would like to thank wholeheartedly Cambodia-Japan Digitalized Manufacturing Center (CJDM) for warmly welcome the technology team from the Robotics Factory for a meaningful working visit.
content:
AI FARM ROBOTICS extends heartfelt gratitude to the Cambodia-Japan Digitalized Manufacturing Center (CJDM) for warmly welcoming the technology team from the Robotics Factory during their recent working visit. Under the strong leadership and clear vision of H.E. Dr. Chet Chealy, Rector of RUPP, CJDM is set to support all technical schools in Cambodia, fostering advanced learning and skill development in the manufacturing sector.

 

 

The cutting-edge machines at CJDM were generously donated by DMG MORI, a global leader in high-precision machine tools. This advanced automated technology represents a collaboration built on over 200 years of expertise from both DMG in Germany and MORI in Japan, bringing powerful capabilities to the forefront of Cambodian manufacturing.

 

 

As the first digital manufacturing center in Cambodia, CJDM offers comprehensive training in product design using high-end CAD/CAM/CAE software and CNC machine operation. In addition to training, the center conducts vital research and development in digital manufacturing, positioning itself as a hub for innovation in the region.

 

 

AI FARM ROBOTICS, as a local player in the robotics and automation industry, seeks to extend cooperation with CJDM to build a stronger, more dynamic industrial engineering support ecosystem. This collaboration aims to empower SMEs and manufacturing factories within Cambodia's special economic zones, driving growth and technological advancement across the nation.

title: ការប្រកួតរ៉ូបូតថ្នាក់ជាតិ​ នៅថ្ងៃទី១៤​ ខែកក្តដា​ ឆ្នាំ២០២៤!
description: អបអរសាទរដល់ក្រុមនិស្សិត​កម្ពុជា Robocon 2024 ទាំងអស់​ នៅក្នុងការប្រកួតរ៉ូបូតថ្នាក់ជាតិ​ នៅថ្ងៃទី១៤​ ខែកក្តដា​ ឆ្នាំ២០២៤!
content:
ពិតហេីយការប្រកួតមានឈ្នះចាញ់​ ប៉ុន្តែលទ្ធផលយ៉ាង​ណា ក៏និស្សិតទាំងអស់ឈ្នះរួចទៅហេីយ នោះគឺការបន្តធ្វេីឱ្យវិស័យឧស្សាហកម្មកម្ពុជា​ មានការរីកចម្រេីនកាន់តែប្រសេីរ។ រក្សាក្តីសុបិន​ បន្តគោលដៅ​ ពង្រឹងសមត្ថភាព​ បន្ថែមការខិតខំ​ ព្រោះទាំងអស់គ្នា​ ក្នុងនាមជាវិស្វ័ករជំនាញ​ឧស្សាហកម្ម គឺជាអនាគតនៃជាតិយេីង​ និងជាក្តីសង្ឃឹមរបស់ប្រទេសយេីង​ ក្នុងបេសកកម្មអភិវឌ្ឍជាតិមាតុភូមិយេីង​ ឱ្យក្លាយជាប្រទេសខ្លាំងផ្នែកឧស្សាហកម្មក្នុងពិភពលោក!

ក្នុងឱកាសនេះ​ យេីងក៏អបអរសាទរប្អូនៗវិស្វ័កររ៉ូបូត​ នៃសាលាតិចណូ​ ដែលបានឈ្នះជាជេីងឯករ៉ូបូតថ្នាក់ជាតិឆ្នាំ២០២៤! យេីងពិតជាមេីលឃេីញថាប្អូនៗ​ ពិតជាខំប្រឹងប្រែងណាស់សម្រាប់ឆ្នាំនេះ​ ហេីយការតស៊ូមិនបោះបង់​នេះ ពិតជាបានលទ្ធផលល្អយ៉ាងពិតប្រាកដមែន!

3ក្នុងនាមជាក្រុមហ៊ុនធុរកិច្ចថ្មីមួយ​ ក្នុងវិស័យរ៉ូបូត​ បញ្ញាសិប្បនិម្មិត្ត​ និងស្វ័យប្រវត្តិកម្ម​ នៅកម្ពុជា​ យេីងពិតជាមានមោទនភាពចំពោះនិស្សិតវិស្វ័ករទាំងអស់គ្នា! 
សេចក្តីព្យាយាមរបស់ទាំងអស់គ្នា​ បានជំរុញចិត្តយេីង​ ឱ្យបន្តដំណេីរទៅមុខ​ ដេីម្បីប្រែក្លាយប្រទេសកម្ពុជាទៅជាប្រជាជាតិរ៉ូបូតមួយ​ ក្នុងពិភពលោក។

ខាងក្រោមនេះជា សកម្មភាពក្រុម​ ROBOCON មកពីសាលា​តិចណូ​ ITC ត្រៀមខ្លួន​ ជាមួយរ៉ូបូតរបស់ខ្លួន​ ២៤ម៉ោង​ មុនការប្រកួត​រ៉ូបូតថ្នាក់ជាតិ​ នៅថ្ងៃទី១៤​ ខែកក្តដា​ ឆ្នាំ២០២៤​ នេះ​ នៅពហុកីឡដ្ឋានមរតកតេជោ​ !

 

 

ឆ្នាំនេះ​ AI FARM និង​ សមាគម​ CRIDA បានចូលរួមគាំទ្រទាំងសាលាតិចណូ​ ITC​ ទាំងពីរក្រុម​ និង​ NPIC ហេីយឆ្នាំក្រោយ​ យេីងនឹងគាំទ្រដល់សាលាច្រេីនជាងនេះ!

 

 

ការគាំទ្ររបស់យេីង​ មិនដេីម្បីរកឈ្នះចាញ់ទេ​ ប៉ុន្តែយេីងគាំទ្រស្មារតីឧស្សាហកម្មនិងការច្នៃប្រឌិតរបស់និស្សិតកម្ពុជា​ ក្នុងវិស័យរ៉ូបូត​ បញ្ញាសិប្បនិម្មិត្ត និងស្វ័យប្រវត្តិកម្ម​ នៅកម្ពុជា!

 

 

មួយជំហានម្តងៗ​ យេីងនឹងខ្លាំងដូចប្រទេសឧស្សាហកម្មដទៃទៀតក្នុងពិភពលោក!​ បេីជាតិសាសន៍គេធ្វេីបាន​ យេីងច្បាស់ជាធ្វេីបានដូចគ្នា។

 

 

ខាងក្រោមនេះជា សកម្មភាពក្រុម​ ROBOCON មកពីសាលា​ NPIC ត្រៀមខ្លួន​ ជាមួយរ៉ូបូតរបស់ខ្លួន​ ២៤ម៉ោង​ មុនការប្រកួត​រ៉ូបូតថ្នាក់ជាតិ​ នៅថ្ងៃទី១៤​ ខែកក្តដា​ ឆ្នាំ២០២៤​ នេះ​ នៅពហុកីឡដ្ឋានមរតកតេជោ​ !

 

 

ឆ្នាំនេះ​ AI FARM និង​ សមាគម​ CRIDA បានចូលរួមគាំទ្រទាំងសាលា​ NPIC និងសាលាតិចណូ​ ITC ហេីយឆ្នាំក្រោយ​ យេីងនឹងគាំទ្រដល់សាលាច្រេីនជាងនេះ!

 

 

ការគាំទ្ររបស់យេីង​ មិនដេីម្បីរកឈ្នះចាញ់ទេ​ ប៉ុន្តែយេីងគាំទ្រស្មារតីឧស្សាហកម្មនិងការច្នៃប្រឌិតរបស់និស្សិតកម្ពុជា​ ក្នុងវិស័យរ៉ូបូត​ បញ្ញាសិប្បនិម្មិត្ត និងស្វ័យប្រវត្តិកម្ម​ នៅកម្ពុជា!

 

 

មួយជំហានម្តងៗ​ យេីងនឹងខ្លាំងដូចប្រទេសឧស្សាហកម្មដទៃទៀតក្នុងពិភពលោក បេីជាតិសាសន៍គេធ្វេីបាន​ យេីងច្បាស់ជាធ្វេីបានដូចគ្នា!

title: Empowering Cambodia through Investment and Innovation
description: Building a Sustainable Future: Khamsa Group's Vision for Innovation and Growth
content:
"Be all we can be" embodies our core philosophy at Khamsa Group. As a local investment company, we aspire to become one of the largest investment corporations in the world. Our goal is to be recognized as the leading high-net-worth individual asset management corporation in Asia by 2050. We believe in the power of imagination—what we can envision, we can achieve. However, we also understand that words without action are meaningless. Embracing the belief that "a journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step," we remain determined to carve our own path and create our own opportunities.

 

 

Throughout our journey, we reach for the moon, knowing that even if we fall short, we will land among the stars. As Cambodians, we are born builders, committed to constructing our own empire and the future we wish to see. Our third philosophy is rooted in shared prosperity. We invest in future industries to create a happier world through innovation and new business ventures, supported by our investment arm, the Future Fund - Fund the Future World.

 

 

We recognize that the next 100 years will be shaped by technological advancements. With projections indicating that 50% of today’s jobs will be automated, and the global Big Data Analytics Market expected to grow significantly, we are positioned at the forefront of these changes. Our focus on developing innovative business models and products for the Asian market aligns with the trends in data-driven applications and artificial intelligence, which are anticipated to generate substantial economic activity in the coming years.

 

 

The Future Fund aims to address critical issues like biodiversity and climate change, emphasizing that "Biodiversity is Biosecurity." We believe that investing in a vibrant natural world is essential for sustainable prosperity. By raising awareness, educating future leaders, and valuing nature in economic terms, we can create a resilient ecosystem that benefits both the environment and the economy.

 

 

Finally, as we look toward the future, we are committed to innovative business models that align with nature. The recent pandemic has highlighted our vulnerability, reinforcing the need for solutions that harmonize with the natural world. Our investment strategy aims to capitalize on emerging opportunities in food, infrastructure, and energy sectors, projecting significant economic growth and job creation by 2030. With a focus on sustainability and innovation, Khamsa Group is poised to lead the way in building a prosperous future for Cambodia and beyond.
